channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: TikTok’s future looks bleak
item.description: TikTok’s future prospects in the United States looked grimmer than ever Friday, following a bruising day of Supreme Court arguments in a case that could determine whether the app is forced to shut down on January 19.
item.dc:creator: Issie Lapowsky, Fast Company

item.title: 5 GenAI principles for K-12 education
item.description: Imagine this: A new technology has arrived, drawing enormous public discussion. Among the questions is how it might be used in schools. Advocates call for its widespread adoption, saying it will revolutionize schooling and motivate students. Others are wary, fearing it will make kids lazy.
item.dc:creator: Jack Lynch, Fast Company

item.title: Zuckerberg says Biden officials would 'scream,' 'curse' at Meta team over COVID takedown requests
item.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg said Biden administration officials would “scream” and “curse” at his employees when they disagreed with the government’s takedown requests over pandemic-related content.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: IRS ‘prepared’ for 2025 filing season, but potential spending cuts loom for the agency
item.description: For the 2025 tax filing season, the IRS is expanding several modernization efforts. But potential budget cuts on the table could curtail those efforts. The post IRS ‘prepared’ for 2025 filing season, but potential spending cuts loom for the agency first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Drew Friedman, Federal News Network

item.title: Prime Video's use of AI, Next Gen Stats on NFL games is helping viewers understand the game better
item.description: CULVER CITY, Calif. (AP) — The Los Angeles Rams defense appeared to be content to drop back in coverage and prevent San Francisco’s Brock Purdy from completing a Hail Mary on the final play of their Thursday night game on Dec. 12. The broadcast on Amazon Prime Video saw it differently, though.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: TikTok gets frosty reception at Supreme Court in fight to stave off ban
item.description: TikTok received a frosty reception in its fight to save the platform at the Supreme Court, which during oral arguments Friday expressed sympathy with the government’s national security concerns about the platform’s ties to China.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, NewsNation

item.title: US Tech Hiring Rose in December, Unemployment Rate Hits 2%
item.description: The US Bureau of Labor Statistics reports a 2% unemployment rate in the tech sector, its lowest since November 2023.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: UAE company to invest $20B in U.S. AI data centers
item.description: A United Arab Emirates investment firm has pledged $20 billion to build new data centers targeting AI across a number of locations across the United States.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Lenovo is building a billion-dollar PC and server plant in Saudi Arabia
item.description: Together with a new headquarters, Lenovo will manufacture “millions” of PCs and servers at a new facility.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: H-1B: Silicon Valley’s favorite foreign-worker visa under attack, while Trump, Musk offer support
item.description: The schism in MAGA raised questions about the fate in the second Trump era of a visa seen in Silicon Valley as key to the technology industry's innovation and success. It comes at a time when the tech industry has gained unprecedented proximity to U.S. levers of power.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: Amazon is selling its ad tools to other ecommerce sites
item.description: Online retailers can now pay Amazon to use its advertising service, complete with measurement and reporting tools.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Leaked Samsung Galaxy S25 Slim benchmark hints at the phone's key specs
item.description: We now think we know the specs of the fourth Galaxy S25 phone in the flagship series that's about to launch.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Want a cheaper Apple Pencil for your iPad? This $30 alternative comes with Find My tracking
item.description: Want a more affordable Apple Pencil alternative? ESR has you covered with the $30 Geo Digital Pencil.
item.dc:creator: alexblake.techradar@gmail.com (Alex Blake), TechRadar

item.title: TikTok’s future hangs in balance at Friday’s Supreme Court arguments
item.description: TikTok’s future will hang in the balance Friday when the Supreme Court hears oral arguments about a federal law that could ban the video-sharing platform nationwide in less than 10 days.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, The Hill

item.title: Tableau certification guide: How to boost your data analytics skills
item.description: Data visualization platform Tableau is one of the most widely used tools in the rapidly growing business intelligence (BI) space, and individuals with skills in Tableau are in high demand.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The Power of Artificial Intelligence for Small to Medium Businesses
item.description: Small to medium businesses (SMBs) can leverage artificial intelligence (AI) to drive innovation, stay ahead of market trends, and capture new opportunities, despite the challenges that come with adoption.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Akeneo aims to transform the retail playbook with AI and data consistency
item.description: Australian retailers have spent much of the last few years buffeted by economic challenges. In 2024, squeezed by the rising cost of living, inflationary impact, and interest rates, they are now grappling with declining consumer spending and confidence.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: OPM giving two big data platforms a much-needed facelift
item.description: Taka Ariga, the chief data officer at the Office of Personnel Management, said the agency is modernizing, better integrating the EHRI and FedScope databases. The post OPM giving two big data platforms a much-needed facelift first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: PowerSchool hack exposes Indiana students' data
item.description: BROWNSBURG, Ind. -- Multiple Indianapolis area school corporations confirmed an unauthorized user accessed its student information system as part of a national data breach.
item.dc:creator: Tyler Haughn, NewsNation

item.title: How to use the new Lock object in C# 13
item.description: The C# programming language has provided support for thread synchronization using the lock keyword since its earliest versions. By using a lock statement, you ensure that only one thread can execute the body of the statement at a time. Any other thread is blocked until the lock is released.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Google faces privacy lawsuit as judge highlights data governance concerns
item.description: A federal judge in San Francisco has ruled that a privacy lawsuit against Google, alleging the company improperly collected personal data from mobile devices, can proceed.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Meta tries letting Facebook Marketplace users view eBay listings as way to resolve EU charges
item.description: Meta said Wednesday that it will allow some Facebook users to view eBay listings on its Marketplace service, as it tries out a possible way to resolve European Union charges of anticompetitive behavior that the bloc leveled last year.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Meta rolls back hate speech rules as Zuckerberg cites 'recent elections' as a catalyst
item.description: It wasn't just fact-checking that Meta scrapped from its platforms as it prepares for the second Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jeff Bezos and Lauren Sanchez to marry in Italy: Source
item.description: Amazon billionaire and his blushing bride-to-be, Lauren Sanchez, held a lovely dinner party over the holidays at Matsuhisa in Aspen.
item.dc:creator: Paula Froelich, NewsNation

item.title: Federal cyber leaders on delivering innovation
item.description: Need innovation inspiration when it comes to cyber? The post Federal cyber leaders on delivering innovation first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: wfedstaff, Federal News Network

item.title: Closing the digital gap: The importance of secure development practices in government IT modernization
item.description: In today's fast-paced digital landscape, effective government IT modernization is crucial for agencies to achieve their missions. The post Closing the digital gap: The importance of secure development practices in government IT modernization first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Nvidia launches blueprints to help jump start AI projects
item.description: Give Nvidia credit, it’s not just talking up big ideas, it’s helping its customers achieve them. The vendor recently issued designs for AI factories after hyping up the idea for several months.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 7+ speedy steps to free up space on your Mac
item.description: Computers get clogged with digital “stuff” over time, and while we all like to think we’re good at managing all that D-detritus, there’s somehow never quite enough time to clean things up.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 6 swift steps for a faster Android experience
item.description: Well, I’ll be: It’s a new year! Already. Somehow. I think. (For full disclosure, I’m still at least 77% asleep from my traditional end-of-year hibernation/hiatus. Kindly forgive any mid-sentence snores or nonsensical outbursts.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Meta eliminates fact-checking in latest bow to Trump
item.description: Meta chief executive officer Mark Zuckerberg on Tuesday announced changes to content moderation on Facebook and Instagram long sought by conservatives. Incoming President Donald Trump said the new approach was “probably” due to threats he made against the technology mogul.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, BARBARA ORTUTAY and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Almost nothing remains of Software AG
item.description: Software AG (now legally known as Software GmbH) has sold its Alfabet and Cumulocity divisions, following on from the recent sales of webMethods, StreamSets and TrendMiner.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Meta's new board includes UFC boss Dana White, a familiar figure in Trump's orbit
item.description: Meta has appointed three new members to its board of directors, including Dana White, the president and CEO of Ultimate Fighting Championship and a familiar figure in the orbit of incoming President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Agentic AI: The top challenges and how to overcome them
item.description: As generative AI continues to surge in popularity, we are already seeing it evolve into the next generation of machine-learning-driven technology: agentic AI. With agentic AI, we are not just prompting models and receiving an answer in a simple one-step process.
item.dc:creator: Info World
